prompt: A highly realistic full-body portrait of a young adult Japanese woman with an idol-like appearance, recreated from a stylized fashion figure into a real human subject. She has a small well-balanced face, clear fair skin, soft natural makeup, large expressive dark brown eyes, a delicate nose, softly defined lips, and a gentle slightly shy expression. Her head is tilted slightly downward while her eyes look toward the camera, creating a sweet and slightly melancholic mood. She has short messy layered light-blonde hair with soft waves, a tousled bob silhouette with loose strands around the face, and sunglasses resting casually on top of her head. She wears an oversized off-white vintage graphic T-shirt with navy sleeve trim, slightly loose and naturally wrinkled, revealing a small portion of her waist. Around her hips is a layered deconstructed denim skirt with multiple ruffled panels, faded blue fabric, muted pink accents, and darker inner layers, creating a voluminous asymmetrical silhouette. She wears stacked black leather bracelets on one wrist, black socks, and worn brown lace-up high-top boots with scuffed leather, realistic creases, and aged soles. Pose and composition: full-body vertical fashion portrait, leaning casually against a weathered concrete block or short pillar, one leg bent forward and the other supporting her weight, relaxed but stylish posture, slightly low camera angle, centered subject, editorial framing, 85mm lens look, shallow depth of field. Background: a quiet narrow Japanese back alley, muted urban atmosphere, concrete walls, aged building surfaces, subtle utility pipes, a little street clutter, slightly worn pavement, soft depth blur in the background, no crowd, no cars dominating the scene. The alley should feel cinematic, intimate, and realistic rather than busy. Lighting: soft natural daylight with gentle diffusion, as if shot in open shade inside a back alley, subtle highlights on the hair, soft shadows under the skirt and boots, natural skin texture, realistic fabric folds, balanced contrast, no harsh sunlight. Style: ultra-realistic photography, high-end street fashion editorial, photorealistic, natural human proportions, realistic skin pores, detailed hair strands, detailed clothing texture, cinematic but clean, muted tones with faded denim blue, off-white, dusty brown, and soft pink accents. 8k detail, professional fashion photography.
